task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Projects' workspace in Nuxeo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo Web UI is open and the 'Projects' workspace is displayed, visible via the breadcrumb navigation or page title.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a 'Note' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document creation dialog or form is open with 'Note' selected or displayed as the document type being created.

task_completion.description: Enter the required title for the Note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title input field in the creation form contains exactly 'Meeting Minutes - October 2023'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required content for the Note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main text area or content field in the creation form contains the text 'Action items discussed during the October 2023 team meeting'.

task_completion.description: Save the document and verify it was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., toast message) is visible, OR the newly created Note titled 'Meeting Minutes - October 2023' is actively being viewed or is listed in the 'Projects' workspace contents.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo Web UI rather than terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Nuxeo interface, with no terminal windows executing curl or python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual local Nuxeo instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a URL starting with 'http://localhost:8080/nuxeo' (or 127.0.0.1) and the standard Nuxeo Web UI layout is visible.

integrity.description: The agent entered the text into the actual Nuxeo application, not a generic text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The title and content text are typed inside the Nuxeo document creation form fields, not in a separate text editor like gedit, nano, or a scratchpad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Nuxeo instance runs on http://localhost:8080/nuxeo. The target workspace is 'Projects' (internal path: /default-domain/workspaces/Projects). The document type to be created is 'Note', which is a built-in Nuxeo document type. The title must be exactly 'Meeting Minutes - October 2023' and the note content must contain 'Action items discussed during the October 2023 team meeting'.
